content: Recent 2024-2025 advances in pancreatic cancer early detection include liquid biopsy tests detecting circulating tumor DNA and exosomes, AI-enhanced imaging for subtle lesion detection, and novel biomarker panels (CA19-9 combined with THBS2, LRG1, and TIMP1). The CancerSEEK test and Galleri multi-cancer early detection test show promise for pancreatic cancer screening in high-risk populations. Clinical trials are ongoing for surveillance protocols using endoscopic ultrasound combined with biomarker monitoring in patients with familial risk or new-onset diabetes after age 50.
source: Nature Medicine 2025 & Journal of Clinical Oncology 2024
sub_question: What are the latest advances in early detection?
